mapper.insert: INSERT INTO achievement(link_id, source_id, title, content, url, school, field, journals, funders, publish_time, tech_keywords, stage, domain, application_scenario, ai_raw_response) VALUES(#{linkId}, #{sourceId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{url}, #{school}, #{field}, #{journals}, #{funders}, #{publishTime}, #{techKeywords}, #{stage}, #{domain}, #{applicationScenario}, #{aiRawResponse})
